pred_reason: SWC-101 is appropriate due to identified integer overflow/underflow vulnerabilities from unsafe arithmetic operations. SWC-107 applies because of multiple reentrancy risks found in external calls before state updates. Evidence: Integer overflows confirmed in Task 5 findings due to Solidity version arithmetic; Reentrancy vulnerabilities detected in dividend functions with external calls (Tasks 1-4); State changes occurring after external transfers violate checks-effects-interactions pattern (Task 3)
